title: peliosanthes luteoviridis
intro: Peliosanthes luteoviridis, also known as the Golden-Flowered Peliosanthes, is a plant species belonging to the family Asparagaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Himalayas and China, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its potential in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in tea infusions or decoctions, and its dried roots and rhizomes are used to make medicinal tonics and extracts.
